## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Mindr and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflows, and collaboration for DUI.org and Talk-a-Lot websites.](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content approval process needs streamlining; Prateek to add stage-by-stage checklist in Airtable for tracking](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)
  - [Focus on automotive non-standard SR22 insurance content; avoid diluting with motorcycle/RV insurance topics](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=29.0)
  - [Website redesign launch planned for late October/early November; content team to focus on blog content generation](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Potential opportunity to leverage AI for partner backlink outreach and content exchange program](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)

## Topics

### Content Workflow and Approvals

  - [Three calibrations approved; two pending legal approval](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Week 1 articles (9-10) to be shared by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Week 2 and weekly article timelines set for next week](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Brian suggested using Airtable for tracking content approval stages](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=171.0)
  - [Lauren emphasized focus on blog content generation, avoiding navigation/design input](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=224.0)

### Content Topics and Strategies

  - [Prateek to verify personas, topic clusters, and product categories with team](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Content refreshes for underperforming articles approved](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [DUI penalties and consequences to be generic blog post with state-specific links](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Brian to share legal team's state requirement flowcharts for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)

### Website Redesign and Launch

  - [Late October or early November target for website launch](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)
  - [Content team to focus on blog content, avoiding input on site navigation/design](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Approved articles may not be published immediately; awaiting website launch](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Jimmy demonstrated AI tool for personalized partner outreach and content suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Potential for content exchange program with partners for backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=656.0)
  - [Team to discuss opportunity with Lauren and existing agency](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=708.0)

### Clarification on Blog Recommendations

  - [Jessica to double-check with Lauren about blog recommendations for Talk-a-Lot vs. DUI.org](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Brian to email Molly for clarification on DUI blog focus](https://fathom.video/share/6jteySPzktgopxBzxYxqzYnah-P6V_eF?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
